summary: As a Senior Full Stack Engineer with over 6 years of experience, I specialize in architecting and developing robust, scalable, and performant full-stack web applications. My expertise spans across modern technologies including React, Node.js, Python, and cloud platforms like AWS and GCP. I have a proven track record of leading development teams, driving innovation, and delivering high-quality software solutions that meet business objectives. With a strong foundation in both front-end and back-end development, I am passionate about creating seamless user experiences and solving complex technical challenges. I am a proactive problem-solver and a strong advocate for agile methodologies, continuous integration, and test-driven development.

cloudDevOps: AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda, API Gateway, IAM)

description: Led the design and development of a greenfield, cloud-native telecom network planning product, enabling the planning and deployment of 4G/5G networks across India.
Architected and implemented a microservices-based backend using Node.js and Python, deployed on AWS, handling over 1 million transactions per day.
Developed a highly interactive and performant frontend using React and Next.js, providing real-time data visualization and analytics.
Mentored and guided a team of 8 junior engineers, fostering a culture of collaboration and continuous learning.

projects.title: DIA (Direct Internet Access)
projects.description: Developed a B2B portal for enterprise customers to manage their internet leased lines. The portal provided features for order management, billing, and real-time monitoring of network performance.

projects.title: Network Planning Spectrum Lease
projects.description: Built a platform for managing spectrum leasing contracts with other telecom operators. The system automated the entire lifecycle of a contract, from creation to renewal and termination.

description: Developed and maintained a CRM and payment processing system for a fast-growing fintech startup.
Contributed to the development of both the front-end (React) and back-end (Node.js) of the application.
Implemented new features, fixed bugs, and improved the overall performance and scalability of the system.

projects.title: FinTech CRM & Processing Systems
projects.description: Designed and implemented a comprehensive CRM for managing customer relationships and a payment gateway for processing online transactions.

description: Co-founded and led the development of an online tutoring platform connecting students with qualified tutors.
Built the entire platform from scratch using the MERN stack.
Successfully launched the platform and acquired the first 1,000 users.

projects.title: Skaplink (Online Tutoring Platform)
projects.description: An online platform connecting students with tutors for live, interactive sessions. Features included video conferencing, whiteboarding, and session scheduling.

description: Worked on various freelance projects for clients across different domains.
Developed custom web applications, e-governance portals, and automation tools.

projects.title: E-Governance Portals
projects.description: Developed and maintained several e-governance portals for government agencies, facilitating online public services.

projects.title: College Automation Tool
projects.description: An ERP solution for colleges to manage student admissions, attendance, grades, and other administrative tasks.

projects.title: App Monitoring Tool for Parents
projects.description: A mobile application for parents to monitor their children's smartphone usage and online activities.

projects.title: Portfolio Website
projects.description: My personal portfolio website built with Next.js and Tailwind CSS.

projects.title: E-commerce Store
projects.description: A full-featured e-commerce store with a custom backend.

education.degree: Bachelor of Engineering in Computer Science
